title: blakea pascoensis
intro: Blakea pascoensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Calophyllaceae, native to the cloud forests of Peru. It has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Blakea pascoensis include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, pain, and infections. Blakea pascoensis is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
